Baogu At the Movie E269 -Sons of the Neon Night
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: My Heavenly City
programme.desc: Three stories, three struggles for survival, strung together in search of happiness. My Heavenly City uses three interconnected stories to explore the hopeful aspirations of new Asian immigrants moving to New York City – the city of their dreams. We follow a lonely young woman moving to the city to work as a Chinese-English translator, a young couple obsessed with hip-hop and parents dealing with a child with mental illness. They unknowingly influence each other as their paths cross, affecting each other in ways as they go about their lives.

programme.title: Long Day
programme.desc: A story about people meeting and parting with each other as they wander through a dreamlike day. They are all wandering, in her memories, in his novel and in their movies. An omnibus film that explores hellos, goodbyes, longings and reunions throughout the events of a single day.

programme.title: Shin Ultraman
programme.desc: The continued appearance of giant unidentified life forms known as “S-Class Species (Kaiju)” has become commonplace in Japan. Conventional weapons have no effect on them. Having exhausted all other options, the Japanese Government issued the S-Class Species Suppression Protocol and formed an enforcement unit, known as the SSSP. The members chosen for the unit are: captain Kimio Tamura, strategic planner Shinji Kaminaga, unparticle physicist Akihisa Taki, and biologist Yumi Funaberi. In the midst of a Kaiju threat, a silver giant appears from beyond Earth's atmosphere. Analyst Hiroko Asami is newly appointed to the SSSP to deal with this giant and is partnered with Shinji Kaminaga. In Hiroko's report, she writes-“Ultraman, identity unknown.”

programme.desc: A sinister force lurks menacingly behind the warm visage of Pennywise the Clown, who awakens every thirty years, altering reality to animate victims' greatest fears in Stephen King's IT.

programme.title: E2 - He Thought He Could
programme.desc: When Al finds a library book that is 31 years overdue, he decides to finally face the librarian who once pegged him as a deadbeat.

programme.title: E3 - I'm Going To Sweatland
programme.desc: Al is up to his armpits in rock 'n' roll fanatics after Peggy 'sees' an image of her idol in the sweat stains on one of Al's tee-shirts.

programme.title: E4 - Poke High
programme.desc: While Kelly tries to score with a high school fullback, Al roots for the opposing team in hopes his old school record will remain intact.

programme.title: E3 - Take a Look at Me Now
programme.desc: Raquel Ochmonek, the Tanners' next-door neighbor, sees the elusive ALF. After she tells everyone she spotted an alien being, she is treated by the townsfolk, including her husband, as though she were crazy.

programme.title: E18 - Bully
programme.desc: When an art patron discovers a gruesome work of art, it leads gallery visitors to find a woman dead in her apartment above.

programme.title: E19 - Bombshell
programme.desc: After Jerry Bullard is found stabbed in a parking garage, Benson and Stabler discover that the family man might have had an illicit hobby.

programme.title: E2 - Night Fears
programme.desc: A policeman-turned-professor challenges Jessica (Angela Lansbury) to solve a series of campus muggings that soon escalates to murder.

programme.title: E239 - Nature Trail
programme.desc: Peppa and her family are driving out to the countryside to go for a walk in the woods. Peppa and George discover trails of footprints left by little birds and ants.

programme.title: E240 - Pretend Friend
programme.desc: Suzy Sheep has made up a pretend friend called “Leo Lion”. Peppa cannot see Leo but Suzy says that Leo likes roaring and dressing up. Peppa decides that now she can see Leo. Even Mummy and Daddy Pig play along. But George feels a bit left out.

programme.title: E241 - Pen Pal
programme.desc: Peppa has a French pen pal, a girl donkey, named Delphine. They also speak to each other on the telephone. Although Peppa speaks English and Delphine speaks French, they discover that they love lots of the same things.

programme.title: E212 - The Invasion / Prank Day
programme.desc: Barbalala receives a package and discovers little pink animals inside, which she calls the SQUEAKIES. // Barbabravo, Barbalala and Barbabeau are fed up with their brothers and sisters laughing at their expense.

programme.title: E105 - The Tenderest Bond Of All
programme.desc: While the family makes pottery, Barbabravo and Barbabright try to set the world record for the largest cheese souffle

programme.title: E202 - Time Out
programme.desc: Tim tries to relax, but Tia has other ideas.

programme.title: E240 - Pretend Friend
programme.desc: Suzy Sheep has made up a pretend friend called “Leo Lion”. Peppa cannot see Leo but Suzy says that Leo likes roaring and dressing up. Peppa decides that now she can see Leo. Even Mummy and Daddy Pig play along. But George feels a bit left out.

programme.title: E241 - Pen Pal
programme.desc: Peppa has a French pen pal, a girl donkey, named Delphine. They also speak to each other on the telephone. Although Peppa speaks English and Delphine speaks French, they discover that they love lots of the same things.

programme.title: E239 - Nature Trail
programme.desc: Peppa and her family are driving out to the countryside to go for a walk in the woods. Peppa and George discover trails of footprints left by little birds and ants.

programme.title: E205 - The Sand Is Running Away
programme.desc: During a bike ride, the Barbapapa family discovers an old medieval castle in ruins.

programme.title: E501 - Pups Save An Ostrich
programme.desc: The Wingnuts get a new pet ostrich, but it gets lost on the trip home. The PAW Patrol must find and lead it to the Wingnuts' ranch.

programme.title: E301 - The Crew Builds A Vet Clinic / The Crew Builds A Mermaid Party
programme.desc: When the traveling veterinarian Dr. Diwa can't finish all her checkups in Builder Cove in time, Rubble & Crew know just what to do. // Lily's mermaid-themed birthday party is called off when it starts to rain. Time for a construction solution!

programme.title: E409 - Dora's Mermaid Adventure / Mermazing Surprise
programme.desc: Dora and Boots become mermaids and help Marisol the Mermaid save her home, Sirena Sea! // Dora and Boots go across the sea to help their dolphin friend find the best gift ever, a magic jewel!

programme.title: E410 - Octo-Swiper / Tudos Juntos
programme.desc: Dora stops a frantic octopus Swiper and saves the Pearl Day Party! // Dora meets Raquel the Rock Lobster and helps her get the missing instruments back in time to play at the big music show!

programme.title: E217 - Paper Landscapes / Cowgirl
programme.desc: Barbamama and Barbapapa are surprised to see more and more billboards on the road. // Barbalala dreams of becoming a cowgirl and Barbidou is determined to help her.

programme.title: E401 - The Crew Builds A Fancy Drive-Thru Restaurant / The Crew Builds A Castle Sh
programme.desc: When Camila the truck driver needs a place to stop and eat, the pups and Cafe Carl have a fancy idea. But is it too fancy? // Park Ranger Rose and Rosie the goat are putting on a show! But when Rosie disappears, can the pups find her before showtime?

programme.title: E202 - Time Out
programme.desc: Tim tries to relax, but Tia has other ideas.

programme.title: E202 - Cookies
programme.desc: Tim gets the best cookies in town but soon finds that others need them more than him.

programme.title: E303 - The Crew Builds A Sea Wall
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose asks Rubble & Crew to fix the bridge to Bear Island. But when Speed Meister intervenes, the pups have to clean up his mess and protect the bears from a rapidly approaching storm... with help from Auntie Crane's new Bark Yard Zoomer!

programme.title: E110 - Croc-A-Bye Baby / Wanna Eampanada? / If The Boot Fits / Pinata Party
programme.desc: Dora and Boots babysit some rowdy crocs. // Dora and Boots get the Troll to try an empanada at Benny's stand. // Boots tries new wacky new boots that Tico invented. // The twins have their first pinata party, but no one can figure out how to open it.

programme.title: E515 - Big Rig Blaze
programme.desc: When a windstorm blows away the supplies for Stripes' Animal Party, Blaze transforms into the one Monster Machine strong enough to haul it all back - a Big Rig! There's nothing he can't pull with that Big Rig Force!

programme.title: E109 - Borrower Daisy / Can Do Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile and Daisy try to figure out which of her friends borrowed her game and didn't return it. // A perfect 'Step-Mother's' day for Maggie all depends on Daisy and Mr. Crocodile finding a can opener.

programme.title: E102 - Present / Movie / Vinny
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma. // Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie. // Tim fakes it to prove he's just as cool as Kai's cousin.

programme.title: E923 - Pups Save Alex's Feathery Friends / Pups Save A Puffy Mayor
programme.desc: The Paw Patrol must rescue Mr. Porter and reunite an ostrich family before the big birds get into big trouble. // During Mayor Goodway's fashion show, the Pups must save Farmer Al and Mayor Humdinger after a puffy shirt floats away with them.

programme.title: E105 - Hide And Seek
programme.desc: Peppa and George decide to play a game of hide and seek.

programme.title: E223 - The Crew Builds A Kangaroo Safari / The Crew Plays In The Construction Game
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build a kangaroo safari for Lucas and Lily right in the Bark Yard... until their construction kangaroo hops away! // Speed Meister challenges Rubble & Crew to compete in the ultimate build-off: Builder Cove's first Construction Games!

programme.title: E610 - Pups Save A Manatee / Pups Save Breakfast
programme.desc: Farmer Al and Farmer Yumi need help from the PAW Patrol to a get a manatee to the swamp. // Mr. Porter and Alex are in a sticky situation - they're up to their ears in maple syrup! It's up to the PAW Patrol to save the Porter's and Breakfast!

programme.title: E102 - Present / Movie / Vinny
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma. // Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie. // Tim fakes it to prove he's just as cool as Kai's cousin.

programme.desc: Peppa and her family borrow Grandpa Pig's boat for a day on the river. Daddy Pig is the captain, Peppa, George and Mummy Pig are the crew. When the boat gets stuck in some long reeds. Daddy Pig has to use all his strength to push the boat free.

programme.desc: Peppa and Suzy Sheep are having a quarrel and decide they are not best friends anymore. As time goes by they really miss each other but they still refuse to make up.

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E26
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: Regal Studio Presents
programme.desc: A collection of weekly specials which feature timely, feel-good stories.

programme.title: E16 - Robotato
programme.desc: Evil Pea has trapped Supertato and replaced him with an evil robot lookalike called Robotato.

programme.title: E17 - Three Peas In A Pod
programme.desc: Supertato and the Tato Team face a trio of Evil Peas when Mummy Pea and Daddy Pea come to visit Evil Pea. They vow to help her take over the supermarket once and for all.

programme.title: E3 - The Shape Badge
programme.desc: It is a lovely day and the squirrels are playing outside. They are playing the shape game. Working out which shape goes where is quite tricky.

programme.title: E5 - The Footprint Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels are playing hide-and-seek, but they can't find Happy. The squirrels follow lots of different footprints that take them to their friend but there is one set they can't work out.

programme.title: E6 - The Fossil Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels are digging in the garden when they come across a fossil, so Duggee and Narrator explain all about fossils and prehistoric times.

programme.title: E7 - Song Of Peace
programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.title: E8 - Squirrel Babies
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: E10 - Campfire Choir
programme.desc: Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

programme.title: E25 - Taxi
programme.desc: Bluey is running a taxi service. Her first passenger is Businessman Dad, who is in a rush to get to the airport. But with unexpected delays, Dad's in danger of missing his flight!

programme.title: E27 - Pirates
programme.desc: It's an adventure on the high seas as Bluey, Bingo and Missy play Pirates on the hammock swing, but they'll need to find their courage to withstand storms and whale attacks.

programme.title: E13 - The Good Choices
programme.desc: The Squirrels haven't been making good choices round the messy clubhouse. With Duggee's help, they start to get it right. But not before sending Roly's imagination into overdrive!

programme.title: E14 - The Shopping Badge
programme.desc: Duggee loves to shop local, so the Big Shop is a Big Deal for him. He's over-excited and wants two of everything. The Squirrels have to remind him 'we only popped in for milk!'

programme.title: E15 - The Love Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: E7 - Song Of Peace
programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.title: E8 - Squirrel Babies
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: E10 - Campfire Choir
programme.desc: Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

programme.title: E97 - Treasure Trail
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po follow a trail of flowers which leads them to some very special treasure.

programme.title: E26 - Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: E27 - Musical Statues
programme.desc: At the end of a long day, Bluey and her family are out of sync and out of sorts, so Mum gets everyone to play musical statues.

programme.title: E4 - Panicky Percy
programme.desc: Percy causes confusion for everyone and prompts delays, when he spends too much time panicking over nothing.

programme.title: E5 - Crowning Around
programme.desc: Rajiv feels devastated when he loses his crown, thinking that it's the reason he is good at anything, but he soon learns that can still be really useful.

programme.title: E30 - The Boreal Forest, Canada
programme.desc: Glitch travels to Ontario to find a new teddy bear, but things start to go very wrong...

programme.title: E31 - Timgad Ruins, Algeria
programme.desc: The Go Jetters visit Timgad in Algeria, but someone is playing games with their click-ons.

programme.title: E3 - Got Your Goat
programme.desc: Mojo Swoptops and best buddy Bo love to help their friends in the little town of Swoppiton. With a swop of Mojo's top and Bo's brilliant plans, they make an unstoppable team!

programme.title: E4 - Cheesy Bang Bang
programme.desc: The cheese delivery race is on as Mojo and the racer top try to deliver food faster than Filo. But the competition gets too hot when an explosive souffle is on the table!

programme.title: E14 - Imane Ayissi
programme.desc: The designer and ambassador for African fabric Imane Ayissi presents his haute couture collection for the autumn-winter 2023-2024 season.

programme.title: E4 - The Philadelphia Museum Of Art, Impressionism
programme.desc: At the heart of the Philadelphia Museum of Art hang works by leading impressionist painters, such as Manet, Degas, Sisley, Monet, Morisot, Renoir and Pissarro.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: The brigade is divided into three teams, and the members of each trio face off by cooking the same fish. During the challenge, an extra ingredient appears and changes everything.

programme.title: E14 - Alsace, On The Wine Route
programme.desc: Since 1953, the Alsace Wine Route has established itself as an unmissable getaway for lovers of beautiful landscapes. Stretching over more than 170 km, this wine-growing journey offers a scenery rich in traditions. The Alsace vineyard is also an opportunity to discover an incredible diversity of terroirs and grape varieties.

programme.title: E5 - Super Bowls For The Super Bowl
programme.desc: With commentator Matthieu Proulx, host Isabelle Racicot, actress Marie-Eve Perron, and chef Carolyne Frigon, we prepare super healthy bowls to challenge junk food culture.

programme.title: E27 - New Life For A Village House
programme.desc: Cedric and Virginie are in Rixensart to find out about the renovation of a beautiful family home.

programme.title: E7 - Musee Des Beaux-Arts Du Perigord/Tuan Tran/Schiaparelli
programme.desc: The Musee des Beaux-Arts du Perigord offers a rich and varied selection of works. In his studio, Tuan Tran combines the finesse of glass with the brutality of concrete. At Schiaparelli, masculine and feminine are confidently combined. Dive behind the scenes of D'Offard wallpaper production.

programme.title: E14 - Imane Ayissi
programme.desc: The designer and ambassador for African fabric Imane Ayissi presents his haute couture collection for the autumn-winter 2023-2024 season.

programme.title: E4 - The Philadelphia Museum Of Art, Impressionism
programme.desc: At the heart of the Philadelphia Museum of Art hang works by leading impressionist painters, such as Manet, Degas, Sisley, Monet, Morisot, Renoir and Pissarro.

programme.title: E13 - In Saint-Brieuc, With Maxime Tabart
programme.desc: Mory Sacko is at the Haras de Lamballe, in Saint-Brieuc, with magician Maxime Tabart. On today's menu: grey shrimp and Paimpol bean stew.

programme.title: E7 - Special Traditions
programme.desc: Traditions are shaped over time. They are also perpetuated by techniques magnified by Mauviel, Lison de Caunes and Solene Eloy to perfection. Watches, corsets, hoop earrings: small objects can tell great stories.

programme.title: E4 - Vise
programme.desc: Located along the Meuse River, Vise offers an ideal setting for walkers. It includes: Argenteau, Cheratte, Lanaye, Lixhe-Loen and Richelle. Among the highlights: the town hall, a jewel of Mosan Renaissance architecture, its marina, and the Collegiate Church of Saint Martin.

programme.title: E6 - Unusual Schools
programme.desc: From prestigious schools to the most unconventional training programmes, Yvan meets those who pass on their knowledge in rather unexpected places.

programme.title: E2 - Peugeot, The 04 Series
programme.desc: In Rabodanges, in the Orne region. Laurent meets Joel Chauvin, a young retiree and avid Peugeot collector. After a focus on the Mazda MX5, Michel heads to Dieppe to pay tribute to Jean Redele, the father of the Alpine brand.

programme.title: E1 - Mussels And Fries My Way
programme.desc: Together with comedian Brigitte Rosset, Annick Jeanmairet offers you the recipe for a popular dish: mussels and fries. You will learn how to make crispy fries without a deep fryer or an AirFryer. Discovery of the day: artisanal marshmallows.

programme.title: E5 - Champagne: Land Of Excellence
programme.desc: Pascal Bourguignon photographs the classified vineyards of the Marne Valley; the Michelin-starred chef Arnaud Lallement opens the doors to his kitchen; Elsa Berthelot continues the age-old tradition of the ''Compagnons du Devoir''; Champagne Avenue in Epernay, provides a showcase for the world's most prestigious wine merchants...

programme.title: E7 - Noni, The Tree With A Thousand Virtues
programme.desc: In Maupiti as well as in Taravao, noni is cultivated. This shrub, typical of the Polynesian islands, has a bad reputation because of its fruit's unbearable smell. Yet it is used for its antibiotic and antioxidant properties in medicine and also in cooking, when its juice is extracted.

programme.desc: Mory Sacko is at the Haras de Lamballe, in Saint-Brieuc, with magician Maxime Tabart. On today's menu: grey shrimp and Paimpol bean stew.

programme.desc: Located along the Meuse River, Vise offers an ideal setting for walkers. It includes: Argenteau, Cheratte, Lanaye, Lixhe-Loen and Richelle. Among the highlights: the town hall, a jewel of Mosan Renaissance architecture, its marina, and the Collegiate Church of Saint Martin.

programme.title: E6 - Unusual Schools
programme.desc: From prestigious schools to the most unconventional training programmes, Yvan meets those who pass on their knowledge in rather unexpected places.

programme.title: E2 - Peugeot, The 04 Series
programme.desc: In Rabodanges, in the Orne region. Laurent meets Joel Chauvin, a young retiree and avid Peugeot collector. After a focus on the Mazda MX5, Michel heads to Dieppe to pay tribute to Jean Redele, the father of the Alpine brand.

programme.title: E1 - Mussels And Fries My Way
programme.desc: Together with comedian Brigitte Rosset, Annick Jeanmairet offers you the recipe for a popular dish: mussels and fries. You will learn how to make crispy fries without a deep fryer or an AirFryer. Discovery of the day: artisanal marshmallows.

programme.title: E5 - Champagne: Land Of Excellence
programme.desc: Pascal Bourguignon photographs the classified vineyards of the Marne Valley; the Michelin-starred chef Arnaud Lallement opens the doors to his kitchen; Elsa Berthelot continues the age-old tradition of the ''Compagnons du Devoir''; Champagne Avenue in Epernay, provides a showcase for the world's most prestigious wine merchants...

programme.title: E7 - Noni, The Tree With A Thousand Virtues
programme.desc: In Maupiti as well as in Taravao, noni is cultivated. This shrub, typical of the Polynesian islands, has a bad reputation because of its fruit's unbearable smell. Yet it is used for its antibiotic and antioxidant properties in medicine and also in cooking, when its juice is extracted.

programme.title: E13 - In Saint-Brieuc, With Maxime Tabart
programme.desc: Mory Sacko is at the Haras de Lamballe, in Saint-Brieuc, with magician Maxime Tabart. On today's menu: grey shrimp and Paimpol bean stew.

programme.title: E7 - Special Traditions
programme.desc: Traditions are shaped over time. They are also perpetuated by techniques magnified by Mauviel, Lison de Caunes and Solene Eloy to perfection. Watches, corsets, hoop earrings: small objects can tell great stories.

programme.title: Warrior Mothers: The Legend of Speed
programme.desc: After winning yet another race, the underground drag car racer king, Sky, was framed by his rival's brother Fung. On the run in Thailand, Sky hooks up with his long lost father, himself a legendary racer, who steers his son back on course for the ultimate showdown of speed with Fung.

programme.title: Fighting to Survive
programme.desc: Bon Bon, a resident of Tuen Mun, who's always attempting to implement his latest pyramid scheme. Bon Bon rescues a lady from a lecher occasionally and decides to implement his latest scheme, 'One Dollar Bodyguard'. He'll protect women on their evening strolls for one HK dollar. Bon Bon has to attend to his own problem, which is his inability to ride in a moving vehicle, that strands him in Tuen Mun for life. And there's the romantic issue with Snooker to resolve...

programme.title: Warrior Mothers: Fat Choi Spirit
programme.desc: Years ago Andy's passion for Mahjong cost his family their entire fortune, his brother Louis then turned against him. Thus now Louis suffers from economy downturn...

programme.title: Fat Choi Spirit
programme.desc: Years ago Andy's passion for Mahjong cost his family their entire fortune, his brother Louis then turned against him. Thus now Louis suffers from economy downturn...

programme.title: E110 - Rex Dies
programme.desc: As the kids prepare for a big play, Rex is accidentally sucked into a giant fan and Tori is responsible. Robbie is an emotional wreck and it's up to Tori to save the day by saving Rex's life.

programme.title: E122 - Rocky the Vote / One Star Hotel
programme.desc: It's election day and Bester finds herself running for President of the Book Club against her good friend Rocky. // When Best and Bester accidently list the Sub as a guest house, they receive a visitor who they simply must impress.

programme.title: E123 - That Sinkhole Feeling / Like a Brother
programme.desc: Best and Bester get too carried away when tasked with commercializing Bettervale's most beguiling natural wonder. // Diamondo is used to getting everything he wants, and decides what he wants is a sibling, just like Best and Bester.

programme.title: E266 - Escape From Beneath Glove World
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick are sent to jail in the underground tunnels of Glove World, leading to a daring escape.

programme.title: E211 - Trident Trouble
programme.desc: When SpongeBob accidentally picks up Neptune's magic trident, there's no telling what trouble he may cause!

programme.title: E220 - Chapa's Phone Home
programme.desc: When Chapa's beloved long lost cell phone returns to the Man's Nest under mysterious circumstances, her hunt for the truth threatens to destroy Danger Force.

programme.title: E413 - Kings of the Con
programme.desc: Eager to be named Kings of the Con at the Ace Savvy convention, Lincoln and Clyde convince the sisters to go with them as the Full Deck. // But the girls get more attention, leading the boys to do whatever it takes to gain focus.

programme.title: E522 - Farm to Unstable
programme.desc: After realizing farm work with Liam is harder than they thought, Lincoln and the gang look for shortcuts.

programme.title: E318 - Who's Afraid of Mr. Snippers? / A Fish Called Sandy
programme.desc: Squidward and Plankton take to the stage to take down a common adversary. // To experience the ocean firsthand, Sandy swaps genes with a fish.

programme.title: E526 - Appetite for Destruction / Frame on You
programme.desc: When Lily starts misbehaving at home, Mom and Dad think her new preschool friends might be the cause. // When Rusty is wrongfully suspended, the Action News Team leaps into action to clear his name.

programme.title: E208 - Dubu / Jack's Day Off
programme.desc: Halmoni falls in love with a customer's dog. Rather than return him, she dog-naps him and goes on the lam! // Jack volunteers to run the Groom & Board solo, but when a pet snake causes chaos he must protect the other pets from the jaws of death!

programme.title: E304 - Guardians of the Ponytail
programme.desc: Danger Force is hired by Rivalton's Duke Wellington to protect him and his ponytail from his jealous uncle, Archduke Fernando. They at first think it's easy money, until they find out The Archduke hired Ray and Henry Hart to capture Duke Wellington.

programme.title: E105 - Meats of Strength / Dead Ed's
programme.desc: Jack's new friend Beef invites him to a sleepover. Jack, a sleepover newb, freaks out over impressing his new friend. // Jack & Lil try to prove they're the one true local, enduring a series of bizarre quests in the local dive restaurant Dead Ed's.

Fish in Muddy Burrows
programme.desc: Mudskipper fish live on land in muddy burrows. They come out at low tide to look for small plants and animal matter to eat. They can hold water in their gills and by keeping their skin moist they can breathe through it like amphibians do.

programme.title: A New Boy in Town
programme.desc: The ice-dancing girls are desperate for boy partners, and new boy Adriano is moving from Italy to Nottingham to find himself a dance partner. Nine-year-old Charlie lives and breathes ice hockey, but has he got what it takes to impress the coach?

programme.title: The Enchanted Forest
programme.desc: A group of young adventurers explore the largest evergreen moist forest in South Africa, in Garden Route National Park. Along the way they go zip lining, find a massive tree and spot signs of the legendary Knysna elephants.

programme.title: Big Fat Mistery
programme.desc: The kids dive into the mystery of how the ravens have become so fat, and discover a surprising clue!

programme.title: Airborne
programme.desc: A student has crashed on the aerodrome and has broken his wing just before his flying exam. Now, it's up to Sprinter to fix his wing and help him pass the exam.

programme.title: Wet Creatures and Strange Hiding Places
programme.desc: Perhaps Planet Earth should be called Planet Wetness, since it's mostly covered in water! This water contains some fascinating creatures. When danger arrives, some of them find some very strange hiding places.

programme.title: Computer Memory
programme.desc: Find out about the two types of memory used by computers to function - the short term memory for immediate use and the long term memory to store information.

programme.title: Fairy Tales on Earth
programme.desc: When Vicky's plan backfires, all teams are sent to Earth for class. The Gingerbread Witch lures them into her bakery, making teams disappear. Rose, Hawk, Travis, and the others spot the witch's cookie minions and leap into action to free their classmates.

programme.title: What Makes Bread Rise?
programme.desc: Bread rises thanks to a chemical reaction called fermentation and yeast, which converts sugars in the dough into carbon dioxide and ethanol. The carbon dioxide created is trapped in the elastic gluten network causing the dough to rise and expand.

programme.title: Computer Memory
programme.desc: Find out about the two types of memory used by computers to function - the short term memory for immediate use and the long term memory to store information.

programme.title: The Friend (Courteney Cox) and the Showman (Channing Tatum)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary presented by Bear Grylls, award-winning actress and producer Courteney Cox, of Friends, recounts how she became a TV star and Channing Tatum reflects on how he went from a struggling student to a recognized Hollywood actor.

programme.title: A Singing Dog
programme.desc: Tilly, the dog, needs an operation to sort her wonky legs. The Junior Vets are checking Blue's teeth, and Johnny and Inel discover a singing dog and help the owner of an angry bird.

programme.title: River Race

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: Hideyoshi rises to become a senior retainer of the Oda clan and is granted Kita-Omi. Building Nagahama Castle, he becomes a daimyo and, together with Koichiro, takes the surname Hashiba. Tasked with governing the castle town, Koichiro struggles with a severe shortage of manpower. On Hanbei's advice, he decides to hold a selection process to recruit capable retainers. As numerous applicants gather, a group of distinctive young men-including Ishida Mitsunari (Matsumoto Reo) and Todo Takatora (Kaku So)-advance to the final stage.

programme.title: Innovation In Sync, Pioneering The Front!
programme.desc: Innovation in Sync, Pioneering the Front! 'The Frontiers' is your direct link to innovation, powered by the Shenzhen Media Group's AI Lab and China's largest AI models. Get the lowdown on groundbreaking trends-it's all here, served fresh and hot. With our forward-thinking geniuses, every episode is a thrilling journey into the future that's closer than you might think! This program will start in May 27th, tune in every night at 21:20 for a riveting 15-minute exploration.

programme.title: The Super Launching
programme.desc: The Super Launching is a geek program in the realm of popular science. Dedicated to showcasing new technologies, achievements, and breakthroughs from around the world, the program focuses on both highlighting existing hot topics and generating new ones, offering the audience a glimpse into the latest popular science and industry developments. Anchored in an innovative city with a global perspective, the Super Launching has established itself as the best platform for global premieres, debuts, and the launch of first stores.

programme.title: The Super Launching
programme.desc: The Super Launching is a geek program in the realm of popular science. Dedicated to showcasing new technologies, achievements, and breakthroughs from around the world, the program focuses on both highlighting existing hot topics and generating new ones, offering the audience a glimpse into the latest popular science and industry developments. Anchored in an innovative city with a global perspective, the Super Launching has established itself as the best platform for global premieres, debuts, and the launch of first stores.

programme.title: News Of Shenzhen
programme.desc: Presented as a leisurely variety show, the program revolves around the theme: 'Seek Paradise Along the Journey to Kunlun Mountain.' Throughout their travels, the adventurers will uncover lesser-known towns, each exuding its own unique charm. They will explore the distinctive characteristics of these hidden gems, savoring every street and lane, as well as every bite and sip. This immersive experience seeks to rediscover the essence of life, allowing our weary hearts to shine anew amidst the dust of daily grind.

programme.title: Breaking Chains
programme.desc: Economic insecurity is part of a cycle of disadvantages for women, often caused by discrimination in employment and education. Women often don't control key assets such as the family home, property, or the right to make financial decisions, further limiting their chances to break the poverty cycle. HER meets three women striving to change that.

programme.title: Ordering With Apps: Why Gig Workers Are Suffering
programme.desc: Having food delivered through the tap of an app is part of everyday life. Even care workers can be gig workers now. Algorithms decide who gets the job. What does this mean for the labor market and consumers?

programme.title: Urban Foraging - Fresh, Tasty And Free
programme.desc: More and more city dwellers are collecting food in the asphalt jungle. They harvest herbs by the roadside and grow wild vegetables in cracks in the concrete. For these modern foragers and hunters, the food is free, tasty and more varied than in the supermarket.

programme.title: Breaking Chains

programme.title: Electric Mobility: From Ethiopia To The Premium Ev Market
programme.desc: Addis Ababa is expanding electric buses and taxis to cut costs and modernize transport, but the transition faces structural challenges. Plus: we review the DS N°8 and its place among high-end electric cars.

programme.title: E7 - I Wish I Had Another Chance
programme.desc: The Emerald Apple Festival is back and so is a mysterious wish from the town’s festive past. Daniel and Paula revive the traditional apple cart race.

programme.title: E8 - I Wish I Could Find My Family
programme.desc: The stakes are very high as Ruby wrestles with how to solve a wish that hits close to home. Daniel’s in-laws come for a visit, reopening old wounds.

programme.title: E4 - You're So Fresh!
programme.desc: Kelly Clarkson drops into the Top Chef kitchen for a Quickfire based on her new movie, Trolls: World Tour, where the chefs are tasked with combining colorful ingredients from six different musical ‘lands’ to make one delicious dish. For the Elimination Challenge, the chefs are split into two teams to create a cohesive, progressive vegetarian meal for Padma, Tom, Gail and James Beard nominated guest judge Jeremy Fox. The catch is they won’t know what ingredients they’ll be working with until the morning of the challenge when they shop exclusively at the Santa Monica Farmers Market.

programme.title: E5 - Bring Your Loved One To Work
programme.desc: In the Quickfire, it’s a true test of communication as the chefs play a game of telephone with their loved ones as they try to reproduce the dish their family member is currently eating at a nearby restaurant. Then, the chefs are tasked with creating a signature product that they will bottle, use on a dish and sell at a food festival. They may get help from their visiting loved ones, but for one chef, the help won’t save them from being sent home. Celebrity Chef Nancy Silverton is the guest judge joining Tom, Padma and Gail.

programme.title: Piece By Piece
programme.desc: Follow this autobiography where Pharrell Williams shows his imaginative and creative process using Lego, as he constructs Lego models representing his artistic development. Each build reflects a different creative milestone.

programme.title: E6 - Stinky Love
programme.desc: Kimchi whisks one of Mung's smelliest dishes away to a romantic setting on top of the catering company.

programme.title: E21 - The Heavy Sleeper
programme.desc: When Chowder accidentally puts Mung into a deep sleep, he and Shnitzel must try and wake him before Truffles finds out.

programme.title: E25 - The Vacation
programme.desc: Chowder, Mung and Shnitzel just want to spend a nice day at the beach.

programme.title: Piece By Piece
programme.desc: Follow this autobiography where Pharrell Williams shows his imaginative and creative process using Lego, as he constructs Lego models representing his artistic development. Each build reflects a different creative milestone.

Managing Asia
programme.desc: CNBC's longest running feature show. For over 20 years Christine Tan has been talking to people who are shaping, governing and leading the Asia-Pacific region in this multi-award award winning show.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: CNBC Explains
programme.desc: ‘CNBC Explains' is a dynamic explainer series that dives deep into the forces shaping our world. Each episode unpacks complex business and economic topics, breaking them down into clear, compelling narratives. With expert insights, data-driven visuals and a global perspective, this series helps viewers understand not just what is happening, but why it matters.

programme.title: E1 - The Journey Begins
programme.desc: The source of the Mekong River is high up in the Tibetan plateau, from there it flows into Yunnan Province, China, where our journey begins. Even though Yunnan occupies less than 4% of China’s land, it is home to over half of its birds and mammals.

programme.title: E2 - Laos: the Mountain Wilds
programme.desc: Steep mountains and tropical monsoons define the Mekong River valley on its route through Laos. Catch glimpses of the wildlife who find refuge in its vibrant ecosystems, from stump-tailed macaques to pied kingfishers to black-crested gibbons.

programme.title: E2 - Home Away from Home
programme.desc: Swim upriver with the Bay Family, where Anna offers a hand raising her grandpups before heading home to find interlopers on her turf. Watch a flood in the mangroves nearly sweep away a baby, and see the Townies eat clean through their resources.

programme.title: E1 - The Journey Begins
programme.desc: The source of the Mekong River is high up in the Tibetan plateau, from there it flows into Yunnan Province, China, where our journey begins. Even though Yunnan occupies less than 4% of China’s land, it is home to over half of its birds and mammals.

programme.title: E2 - Laos: the Mountain Wilds
programme.desc: Steep mountains and tropical monsoons define the Mekong River valley on its route through Laos. Catch glimpses of the wildlife who find refuge in its vibrant ecosystems, from stump-tailed macaques to pied kingfishers to black-crested gibbons.

programme.title: E1 - Life Begins
programme.desc: For the first few weeks of life, the world is a frightening place. Danger lurks around every corner. It pays to be alert. Whether predator or prey. Any day might be your last. The race is on to grow up fast- for even the largest animals are vulnerable to attack.

programme.title: E5 - Indonesia - Amazon of the Seas
programme.desc: The Indonesian archipelago lies in the heart of the Coral Triangle, a region of the ocean recognized worldwide as the center of marine biodiversity. With the highest number of coral and fish species on earth, Indonesia has the richest reefs on the planet - but these reefs are under threat...

programme.title: E7 - Maldives - Paradise Shrinking
programme.desc: The Maldives face an uncertain future as rising sea levels threaten to wipe out the tiny island. See how researchers are rebuilding the reef around the island, working to save sea turtles, and uncovering complex behaviours of resident manta rays.

programme.title: E5 - Etosha: The Great White Place
programme.desc: Etosha was once a great lake that dried up and now only fills with water seasonally during the summer rains. Once the Etosha pan is full of water, a myriad of water birds congregate in the shallow lake to breed, most notably Greater and lesser flamingos.

programme.title: E1 - River of Life
programme.desc: Avoid scaly and feathery dangers with wallabies, see koolamana lizards battle for mates, and feast with crocodile hatchlings. Brave dangerous rapids and understand the cultural and biological importance of a local river as the rainy season arrives.

programme.title: E6 - End of Summer
programme.desc: Follow vet Tim as he races to save rescued koala Ashley, then meet a flying fox with an extra digit who needs some TLC from vet Martine. Calculate the odds for a run-over kangaroo joey with vet Emily, then celebrate the release of 50 lorikeets.

programme.desc: The show tackled real-life crimes such as murder, trafficking, and abductions through interviews and dramatizations, offering insight into investigations.

programme.desc: Features the local agriculture industry from practical tips on animal raising and planting to stories of entrepreneurs behind the country's most profitable farms and agricultural spaces.

programme.desc: A program that rounds up the trending feel-good stories in the Philippines and offers fashion tips and affordable healthy recipes for Kapuso viewers on a budget.

programme.title: E1 - A Big Day of Fun & Learning!
programme.desc: Join Mia & Max for a big day of fun & learning! First, they go on a lovely little train ride with Tootson & their special friend Twinkle to learn all about shapes. Then, they hop on the Big Red Bus with Daddy, moving their hands like wheels going 'round & wipers going 'swish'! The learning continues as they have a musical drumming session with saucepans, play a game of 'What's In The Bag?' & learn about the world around them while singing & dancing.

programme.title: E5 - Fun and Games with All Our Friends!
programme.desc: It's time for fun & games with all our friends! First, Jill is shy at her first mermaid swimming class, but she learns to have fun & trust herself with the help of her friends. Then, during a Mexican posada, Manny teaches Baby John how to build a piñata. After he gets over being a little scared of the blindfold, he has lots of fun! The fun continues as the friends learn to compromise when they have opposite ideas for playtime.

programme.title: E2 - A Day of Cody's Favorite Things!
programme.desc: Join Cody for a day filled with all his favorite things! First, Cody gets to live out his dino dreams as he dons a dinosaur costume & pretends to be a monster attacking a toy bridge. The fun continues at school, where he starts playing a guitar & his classmates join in to form their very own rock band! Cody also shows his caring side as he & his friends encounter a lost baby duckling & lead the way to help it find the perfect home.

programme.title: E2 - The Ultimate Arpo vs Squirrel Showdown!
programme.desc: It's the ultimate showdown between Arpo & his arch-nemesis, the Squirrel! The trouble multiplies when the squirrel uses a ray gun to create an army of clones that fills the house. Then, the battle for food continues as the squirrel tries to steal a freshly baked apple pie & tasty food from a picnic BBQ. The showdown gets truly bizarre when the squirrel gets trapped inside Arpo & takes control of the robot's body, causing all sorts of confusing chaos for the family!

programme.title: E23 - Mommy is the Best
programme.desc: It's song and dance time! Join JJ, his friends and family celebrating life's big moments for little kids. Come along and be part of their fun everyday adventures.

programme.title: E10 - Mommy’s Proud Day
programme.desc: Its Little Angel! Where baby John, his brother, Jack, and sister, Jill inspire kids and families to have fun and to grow and learn through play. Come sing along!

programme.title: Lego Scooby-Doo! Blowout Beach Bash E1 -Lego Scooby-doo! Blowout Beach Bash
programme.desc: Scooby-Doo! and his pals Fred, Daphne, Velma and Shaggy are no strangers to solving spooky mysteries filled with all types of ghouls and goblins. This time is no different. As Scooby-Doo! and his friends are on their way to Blowout Beach for a real swinging beach party in the Mystery Machine, the Ghost Pirates threaten to ruin the gang's good vibes. It is up to Scooby and the gang to get the party back on track, without missing a beat.

programme.desc: The Musee des Beaux-Arts du Perigord offers a rich and varied selection of works. In his studio, Tuan Tran combines the finesse of glass with the brutality of concrete. At Schiaparelli, masculine and feminine are confidently combined. Dive behind the scenes of D'Offard wallpaper production.

programme.title: L'invite:2026
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: E1 - We're Going To Find Mum!
programme.desc: The world is undergoing a brutal change: technology is breaking down and all sources of energy are disappearing. All except Tes and Oskar's heads, whose hair starts to generate electricity! Using this power, they set out to find their missing mother.

programme.title: E41 - Toto Is Jealous
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: E32 - Atta Leafcutter Ant
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: E13 - Thailand (Part 1)
programme.desc: The journey begins in Korat, the gateway to Isan. Discovery of Ya Mo, an emblematic heroine of the country, followed by a traditional silk production. In Roi Et, a descent from the great tower by zip line and an immersion in Thai gastronomy. In Donkoi, an introduction to the art of indigo dyeing.

programme.title: Premium Spectacular
programme.desc: Premium Spectacular offers Phoenix's finest documentaries in our weekend prime time slot. Each episode comes relevant to the latest news that hits the headlines. programme.title: E155
programme.desc: 'World Insight With Shih' is a weekly special program with in-depth political and economic commentary. The program consists of three segments: 'Viewing the World with Shih', 'Discussing the Past and Present' and 'Speaking New Words'. The senior commentator Shih Chi Ping analyzes the world's political and economic topics from a unique point of view, and deeply analyzes the global trends to audience.

programme.title: E223
programme.desc: MY HONG KONG STORY: Each episode of My Hong Kong Story features a Hong Kong native, or those who surround their tale here. Interviewees convey their indigenized story in a personnel aspect. With a 15-minute essence per episode, the cinematic language brings a new perspective to observe Hong Kong for Chinese-speaking audience around the world. Everyone can have an indepth understanding of Hong Kong and its people.

programme.title: E12 - 中年雄競開啟
programme.desc: 熟齡戀愛旅居真人秀，10位性格各異、魅力全開的50+熟齡男女，帶著一顆敢愛的心，從大理到泰國，在日落時分開啟一段愛情之旅，一同打破恐老焦慮，傳遞歲月從不敗熱愛的生活態度。

programme.title: E12 - 拍完婚紗照就熱吻
programme.desc: 以「尋找勢均力敵的參與者」為核心模式，通過團隊協作任務獲取生存物資，個人競技爭奪約會權，並設置淘汰機制與心動投票綁定規則；素人嘉賓們將逃離都市，直面愛情與生存的挑戰，在人群中尋找勢均力敵的彼此。

programme.title: E2 - 郭孟旭與好友走心聊人生
programme.desc: 由伊能靜擔任團長，董璇、喬杉、李嘉格、余宇涵、沈奕斐等擔任觀察員，以「爸爸圖鑑」為主題，通過展現不同家庭的相處模式，聚焦三位背景各異、育兒方式不同的父親，記錄他們真實的帶娃日常，展現多元的家庭教育模式與溫馨的成長故事。

programme.title: E34 - 電競男神來相親

programme.title: How Do The Oceans Shape Our World?
programme.desc: The oceans cover about 70% of the planet and are crucial for life on Earth. Oceanographer Helen Czerski reveals how the seas around us regulate the climate and the weather, even in the desert.

programme.title: How Do The Oceans Shape Our World?
programme.desc: The oceans cover about 70% of the planet and are crucial for life on Earth. Oceanographer Helen Czerski reveals how the seas around us regulate the climate and the weather, even in the desert.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 日本國稅局「米」課，是令逃稅者聞風喪膽的最終防線。在其內部，新設了一個原創部門——複雜國稅案件處理室「雜國室」。由米田正子（松嶋菜菜子 飾）領軍，集結一群身懷絕技的怪才，專門制裁最棘手難纏的惡德逃稅者，成為體系內獨特而強悍的制裁之刃。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.desc: 日本國稅局「米」課，是令逃稅者聞風喪膽的最終防線。在其內部，新設了一個原創部門——複雜國稅案件處理室「雜國室」。由米田正子（松嶋菜菜子 飾）領軍，集結一群身懷絕技的怪才，專門制裁最棘手難纏的惡德逃稅者，成為體系內獨特而強悍的制裁之刃。

programme.title: E1 - Land Meets Bayou
programme.desc: Similar to any good Cajun dish, a successful duck camp requires preparation. The last day on dry land is filled with essential stops to get ready for 5 days on the Bayou. Whether making sure we have the right ingredients for our favorite meals, or getting the boats brushed up and ready for action, the day before can be just as important as the day of.

programme.title: E1 - Mexico
programme.desc: On a wild and dangerous adventure to Mexico, BMX bikers Rooftop and Catfish test how gutsy they really are. The pair go from racing bikes to racing donkeys, flame throwing and tricking in pointy shoes on the streets, to loosing their breakfast trying to eat eyeball tacos for lunch. But the duo’s bravery (or stupidity) doesn’t end there. They compete in a rodeo, milk a snake for its venom, spin upside down as Voladores in a traditional rain ceremony, and get tattoos right before diving into the city’s toxic sewage. With all of these dauntless activities the question becomes, can Rooftop and Catfish make it out of Mexico in one piece?

programme.title: E4 - Paranormal Extermination
programme.desc: Billy responds to a construction site where a vicious varmint has the tradespeople running scared. Then Billy and Bea investigate a haunted house to find the source of some strange noises.

programme.title: E11 - Digging Deep
programme.desc: Robin uncovers a massive jade lens at Two Mile, but it might be too big for their small operation to dig out.

programme.title: E13 - Between a Truck and a Hard Place
programme.desc: Robin makes a difficult decision about his beloved mine truck 6-Pack after another expensive breakdown, while Claudia makes a desperate call for help to get their jade out of camp before winter shuts them down.

programme.title: E14 - Mutiny on the Mountain
programme.desc: With winter closing in, Claudia pushes her exhausted crew to their breaking point, causing tempers to flare and forcing Claudia to finally take one for the team.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world.
